text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Reporting. The result of the race was... utter
defeat.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I'm terribly sorry for not being able to execute
your orders.
choice_data_list: Failure is the key to success!
Failure is the key to success!

Don't get yourself down. There must be
something we can do.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I'm terribly sorry for not being able to execute
your orders.
choice_data_list: Failure is the key to success!
Failure is the key to success!

Don't get yourself down. There must be
something we can do.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Writing your words to memory. ...Exiting
"dejected" mode and initiating reboot.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Affirmative! I will not end in failure.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Checking... vitals... mind... Abnormalities
confirmed. Lowered motivation detected.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Selection of countermeasures complete.
Permission to purchase an apple.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Based on my previously accumulated data, I have
determined that apples are suitable for increasing
motivation.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
They energize both body and mind. Once my
mood is refreshed, I will fully devote myself to
training.

We buy apples as per Mihono Bourbon's request
and make plans to get a fresh start training for
the next race.
